name: Beacon: ALT Funnel — Next Right Step Audit

body.jsonBody:
={
  "type": "Email",
  "contactId": "{{ $('GHL: Create or Update Contact').item.json.contact.id }}",
  "subject": "{{ $json.subject }}",
  "html": "{{ $json.htmlBody }}",
  "from": "robert@beaconmomentum.com",
  "fromName": "Robert at Beacon Momentum"
}

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "pathway": "{{ $('Parse & Validate Submission').item.json.recommendedPathway }}", "message": "{{ $('Parse & Validate Submission').item.json.pathwayMessage }}", "pathwayUrl": "{{ $('Parse & Validate Submission').item.json.pathwayUrl }}" }
